narrative:
Milford Township has 670 registered voters, with 52.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 31.5 percentage points.
